control.description: Sound Color FX knob MSB CH1
Sound Color FX knob LSB CH1
Toggles or adjusts an effect (show effect rack)
Toggles or adjusts an effect (show 4 effect units)
Toggles or adjusts an effect (show 4 effect units)
Jumps to cue point and play
Syncs tempo with other decks Sampler1
Syncs tempo with other decks Sampler2
Syncs tempo with other decks Sampler3
